subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh in remembrance of God! In this hour when the winds of test and trial have encompassed the horizons of contingent being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الهی در این اوان که اریاح افتتان آفاق امکانرا احاطه نموده است
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
